reasoning: Initial observation suggests a linear relationship between absorbance, molar absorptivity, concentration, and path length. To confirm the relationship, I will increase the molar absorptivity and observe the change in absorbance.

The absorbance has quadrupled when the path length was doubled, confirming the linear relationship according to the Beer-Lambert law. The relationship can be expressed as absorbance = molar_absorptivity * concentration * path_length.
